name: claude-c-suite
description: Executive team perspectives for any codebase: CEO, CTO, PM, CDO, CSO, CLO, COO, CMO, CAIO, CFO, CIO, QA Lead, and DX Lead reviews.

interface.shortDescription: Executive review skills for any codebase.
interface.longDescription: Run focused codebase analysis from CEO, CTO, product, design, security, legal, operations, marketing, AI, finance, data, QA, and developer-experience perspectives inside Codex.
defaultPrompt: Run a CEO review of this repository.
Ask the C-Suite which risk matters most.
Review this codebase from a CTO lens.
